fields.label: Password Reset Notifications
fields.description: Control when and who gets notified that a credential's password is due for rotation

fields.label: Notify when password reset is due
fields.description: Sends an email to the group owner (and any additional recipients below) when Password Reset Due date is today or past

fields.label: Also notify X days before due date
fields.description: Set to 0 to only notify on the due date itself. Set to 7 to also get a heads-up a week early.

fields.label: Always notify Administrator
fields.description: Include Administrator in every password reset notification regardless of group ownership

fields.label: Additional Recipients
fields.description: Comma-separated email addresses to copy on all password reset notifications (e.g. security@company.com, cto@company.com)

fields.label: Account Expiry Notifications
fields.description: Notifications for credentials whose account/subscription at the portal is expiring

fields.label: Notify when account is expiring
fields.description: Sends email reminders at 30, 7, and 1 day before the Account Expiry Date

fields.label: Start notifying X days before expiry
fields.description: First reminder is sent this many days before expiry. Reminders are always sent at 7 days and 1 day regardless.

fields.label: Notify user when access is granted
fields.description: Send an email to the user when a Vault Access Grant is created for them

fields.label: Notify user when access is revoked
fields.description: Send an email to the user when their Vault Access Grant is deactivated
